Sui, Xinxin

睢鑫昕 (Chinese name)

Home Research Publications News
  1. Sui, X. (2025). Discovering Causal Factors in Urban Climate Anomalies: Urbanization, Local Climate, or Global Warming? In preparation.
  2. Sui, X. (2025). Evapotranspiration under Urban Development Environments. Internal review.
  3. Sui, X. (2025). How Texas Cities Alter Warm-Season Storms? Internal review.
  4. Sui, X., Yang, Z., & Niyogi, D. (2025). Diurnal Urban Precipitation Anomalies across Diverse Landscapes. Science Advances. Under review.

Toward a better understanding of uncertainty for satellite precipitation products over complex terrain with sparse rain gauge data. Atmospheric Research, 288, 106742. https://doi.org/10.1016/j.atmosres.2023.106742
